sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n59534" key="koxlia/zwn" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κοχλι-άζων</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">οντος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, in a machine, a kind of <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">κοχλίας</foreign>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0722.tlg001:49:20:6" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Orib.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">49.20.6</biblScope> </bibl> (<abbr TEIform="abbr">v.l.</abbr> -<itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">άξων</itype>).</entryFree>
